series_metadata.series_description: This series contains records generally associated with authorization to use, moor or tie-up at a state or private dock. This series includes, but is not limited to: any application, license, fee, or other record related to a dock license for state or private dock.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 2 years after the State-wide financial statement audit and Agency-Departmental-wide audit are conducted by the State Auditor then destroy. ; Paper: Retain 2 years after the State-wide financial statement audit and Agency/Departmental-wide audit are conducted by the State Auditor, unless they are scanned and saved in an electronic format. After these documents are scanned and saved in an electronic format, the paper copy may be destroyed., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
